name: Tally
description: Tally is a simple, free form builder. Use this API to retrieve form data, list submissions, and configure webhooks to receive real-time notifications when forms are submitted.

capabilities.name: list_forms
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all forms in your Tally workspace.

capabilities.name: get_form_submissions
capabilities.description: Get all submissions for a specific form with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: get_submission
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a single form submission by its ID.
